falsifying_evidence: New leads are not traceable to papers or barriers.
Researchers cannot query for analogous proof techniques across domains.
implementation_status: Seeded by literature_radar.py; full parser/search still needed.
likely_failure_modes: Extraction summarizes papers without capturing proof constraints.
The graph becomes a bibliography instead of a source of hypotheses.
title: Living literature knowledge graph with technique extraction
why_it_matters: Breakthrough work is usually recombination of known mechanisms and unresolved barriers; the project needs memory of the field.

falsifying_evidence: Candidates pass without input model, lower-bound target, or oracle/state-preparation costs.
implementation_status: Basic enforcement implemented in proof_gate.py; candidate generation still needs to call it by default.
likely_failure_modes: The gate becomes paperwork and blocks speculative ideas too early.
title: Proof-obligation gate for every candidate algorithm
why_it_matters: Prevents the system from recording unsupported speedup claims and forces scalable problem families, reductions, and cost accounting.

falsifying_evidence: A proposed lead can ignore known no-go barriers without being flagged.
implementation_status: Implemented in problem_ontology.py with first reduction/barrier graph.
likely_failure_modes: Ontology freezes current beliefs and misses unconventional routes.
Edges are too informal for automated reasoning.
title: Problem and reduction ontology with no-go barriers
why_it_matters: Shor-level algorithms come from reductions and structural reframings; a circuit search cannot see that.

falsifying_evidence: All observables collapse to strong Fourier sampling or classical refinement invariants.
implementation_status: Not yet implemented beyond coset fingerprint smoke metrics.
likely_failure_modes: Interesting measurements require exponential classical preprocessing.
title: Representation-theory and coset-state laboratory
why_it_matters: Nonabelian HSP, GI, and code equivalence require irreps, coset states, and collective measurements, not qubit-level BFS.

falsifying_evidence: Sieve scaling matches Kuperberg/Regev with no structural improvement.
A classical correlation attack recovers the shift.
implementation_status: Partially supported by hidden_shift_metrics and new Gowers/derivative tests.
title: Hidden-shift and dihedral phase-state sieve workbench
why_it_matters: This is one of the few frontier zones with a known subexponential quantum algorithm and lattice implications.

falsifying_evidence: Witnesses do not generalize across n.
No explicit problem family survives the proof-obligation gate.
implementation_status: Not implemented; should replace most oracle-circuit search.
likely_failure_modes: SDPs scale poorly and yield uninterpretable witnesses.
title: Adversary-bound SDP and span-program synthesizer
why_it_matters: Span programs convert query lower-bound structure into algorithms; this is a principled alternative to random circuit search.

falsifying_evidence: Conjectures lack formal predicates.
No generated counterexample changes a research lead.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Counterexamples do not scale or teach structure.
title: Conjecture and counterexample engine
why_it_matters: Research progress often comes from killing false conjectures cheaply and finding the exact boundary of a phenomenon.

falsifying_evidence: No polynomial-bond ansatz separates hard instances.
Success relies on memorizing small instances.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Optimized measurement has no clean mathematical description.
title: Tensor-network search for multi-register measurements
why_it_matters: Known barriers suggest single-register sampling is too weak; tensor networks are the plausible classical tool for exploring collective measurements.

falsifying_evidence: A claimed speedup survives only against brute force.
Classical randomized estimators match the proposed quantum invariant.
implementation_status: Specified in proof obligations; checker not yet implemented.
likely_failure_modes: The checker rejects speculative leads without proof.
title: Classical baseline and dequantization checker
why_it_matters: Most false quantum speedups hide in weak baselines, data loading, or low-rank dequantization.

falsifying_evidence: Derivative spectra are sparse only for classically learnable families.
implementation_status: Implemented exact small-instance U^k and derivative spectrum metrics.
likely_failure_modes: High Gowers norm correlates with classical learnability.
title: Higher-order Fourier and Gowers-uniformity testbed
why_it_matters: Large-Gowers-norm hidden shift algorithms show that higher-order harmonic analysis can be a real algorithmic handle.

falsifying_evidence: Period ridges require exponential precision.
No reduction to a hard lattice problem is found.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Classical lattice reduction exploits the same structure.
title: Lattice and algebraic-number-theory periodicity workbench
why_it_matters: Hallgren/Regev-style ideas show hidden periodicity in number theory is one of the best places to hunt.

falsifying_evidence: No candidate invariant survives data-loading and dequantization checks.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Focus drifts to incremental primitive optimization.
title: QSVT/block-encoding cost calculus
why_it_matters: QSVT is powerful but dangerous: many apparent speedups disappear once encoding and precision are counted.

falsifying_evidence: Generated analogies cannot state proof obligations or falsifiers.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
title: Cross-paper technique recombination engine
why_it_matters: The system should ask questions like: can the proof trick from hidden shift apply to code equivalence?

falsifying_evidence: No nontrivial reduction can be machine-checked on finite models.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Formalizing domains costs more than the search.
Generated reductions are too weak or circular.
title: Reduction miner using symbolic unification
why_it_matters: A new reduction can be as valuable as a new circuit; reductions define what a breakthrough would affect.

falsifying_evidence: The engine scores toy BV variants higher than known frontier problems.
implementation_status: Partially implemented through audit diagnostics; benchmark suite still needed.
title: Benchmark suite of known algorithms and no-go barriers
why_it_matters: A discovery engine must rediscover Shor/Simon/Hallgren mechanisms and fail on known-dead strategies before being trusted.

falsifying_evidence: Claims are not linked to papers, reductions, or experiments.
implementation_status: Not implemented; old Theorist/Analyzer should be deleted rather than extended.
likely_failure_modes: Critique is rhetorical rather than mathematical.
title: Multi-agent hypothesis generation with adversarial review
why_it_matters: LLMs are useful for breadth, but only with red-team critique and hard gates.

falsifying_evidence: Synthesized schema lacks a proof path or scalable invariant.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
title: Program synthesis over algorithm schemas, not gate sequences
why_it_matters: Searching over QFT/phase-estimation/walk/QSVT schemas has far higher ceiling than raw gates.

falsifying_evidence: Positive signals disappear under larger generated families.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Wrong model class gives false optimism.
title: Scaling-law experiment manager with Bayesian model comparison
why_it_matters: Finite experiments matter only if they compare asymptotic hypotheses and fail fast.

falsifying_evidence: Only trivial circuits can be verified.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Proof assistant libraries lack required mathematics.
title: Formal verification path for candidate algorithms
why_it_matters: A serious system should eventually prove circuit identities and reductions, not trust prose.

falsifying_evidence: Gap-overlap product never beats amplitude amplification.
implementation_status: Basic spectral metric exists; full analyzer not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Spectral proxies do not imply implementable walks.
title: Quantum-walk geometry analyzer
why_it_matters: Walk algorithms need geometry; this checks whether state spaces beat Grover before algorithm design.

falsifying_evidence: No family passes classical-baseline and proof-obligation gates.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Generated structures have no hard baseline.
title: Finite-field and algebraic-geometry family generator
why_it_matters: Explicit families are the raw material for hidden shift, property testing, and code-equivalence experiments.

falsifying_evidence: Classical canonicalization solves all generated families quickly.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Generated instances are easy for classical tools.
title: Hard instance generators for code equivalence and graph isomorphism
why_it_matters: Without hard families, coset-state experiments are meaningless.

falsifying_evidence: Any future run produces unsupported speedup claims again.
implementation_status: Recommended; root entrypoint already bypasses it, files still present for now.
likely_failure_modes: Deletion hides historical mistakes instead of documenting them.
title: Delete the old tiny-circuit LLM loop
why_it_matters: It actively creates false confidence and should not remain a first-class path.

falsifying_evidence: Dashboard presents them as successes.
implementation_status: Partially done through dashboard relabeling; physical quarantine still pending.
likely_failure_modes: Historical data may be accidentally treated as discoveries.
title: Quarantine legacy result corpus as negative examples
why_it_matters: The old outputs are useful only as anti-examples for the proof gate.

falsifying_evidence: Generated code still controls evaluation without typed semantics.
implementation_status: Not implemented; best resolved by deleting legacy simulator.
likely_failure_modes: Better answer is to delete the code path.
title: Sandbox or eliminate generated Python execution
why_it_matters: The current `exec` path is unsafe and scientifically noisy.

falsifying_evidence: Dashboard metrics drive decisions instead of proof obligations.
implementation_status: Recommended; wording changed but file remains.
likely_failure_modes: A research log still needs a readable surface.
title: Remove web dashboard as a central artifact
why_it_matters: The dashboard incentivizes demos and status optics instead of research progress.

falsifying_evidence: Rejected ideas keep returning without new evidence.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Reviews are not tied to experiments.
title: Expert review workflow with decision logs
why_it_matters: Breakthrough odds rise when machine-generated hypotheses are aggressively reviewed by humans with field context.

falsifying_evidence: The same toy-oracle or no-go-barrier mistake recurs.
implementation_status: Partially represented by ontology barriers.
likely_failure_modes: Negative results overgeneralize and block creativity.
title: Negative-result database
why_it_matters: Avoiding repeated dead ends is a direct expected-value gain.

falsifying_evidence: New relevant papers are absent from the knowledge graph for months.
implementation_status: Static seeds implemented; recurring automation not implemented.
likely_failure_modes: Noise from irrelevant papers overwhelms signal.
title: Recurring arXiv monitor for quantum algorithms
why_it_matters: Current literature can change frontier priorities; the project should notice automatically.

falsifying_evidence: Classical trace estimators match quantum access-model cost.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
title: Random-matrix and spectral invariant search
why_it_matters: May reveal separations for isomorphism-like problems, but many invariants are classically estimable.

falsifying_evidence: Used to rank ideas before proof obligations are met.
implementation_status: Not implemented.
title: Fault-tolerant resource estimator
why_it_matters: Useful after a real candidate exists; not a primary discovery driver.
